name: omp-pantheon
description: OMP Pantheon plus Seshat/SpecSafe integration bundle

scripts.format: bun x --bun @biomejs/biome format --write hooks test skills evals/config.json evals/cases evals/rubrics extensions/oh-my-omp/index.ts extensions/oh-my-omp/evalfly extensions/oh-my-omp/hooks extensions/oh-my-omp/loop
scripts.format:check: bun x --bun @biomejs/biome format hooks test skills evals/config.json evals/cases evals/rubrics extensions/oh-my-omp/index.ts extensions/oh-my-omp/evalfly extensions/oh-my-omp/hooks extensions/oh-my-omp/loop
scripts.lint: bun x --bun @biomejs/biome check hooks test skills evals/config.json evals/cases evals/rubrics extensions/oh-my-omp/index.ts extensions/oh-my-omp/evalfly extensions/oh-my-omp/hooks extensions/oh-my-omp/loop
